savedAddresses.name: Vasantika Sen
savedAddresses.street: Flat 402, Royal Residency, Juhu Tara Road

designers.name: Aditi Deshmukh
designers.bio: Aditi Deshmukh celebrates the pristine beauty of Banarasi weave. Based in Mumbai, she is a revivalist of handloom heritages, transforming ancient Indian artistry into highly contemporary, dramatic bridal and wedding silhouettes with gold zardozi.
achievements: Vogue India Designer of the Year (Heritage Revival) 2024
Costume Designer for National Award-winning Period Film
Empaneled with the Craft Council of India Artisans Guild

history.event: Launched flagship luxury atelier in Colaba, Mumbai.
Designed the acclaimed 'Benares Royals' bridal line featured in Harper's Bazaar.
Established India's first silk weaver-collaborative fair-trade initiative.
Selected to present the cultural opening showcase at Mumbai Fashion Week.

designers.name: Meera Khanna
designers.bio: Meera Khanna defines modern structure for the dynamic young professional woman. From her studio in New Delhi, her focus is pristine tailoring, sculptural linen, fine crepes, and elegant workwear and sharp drapes with smart custom adjustments.
achievements: Designed the 'Nouveau Boardroom' series for Global Leaders Summit
Pioneer of ultra-high-thread-count anti-crease linen blend patent

history.event: Graduated with top honors from NIFT Delhi and launched 'KHANNA' minimal line.
Launched structural power blazer dresses that went viral among India's tech co-founders.
Collaborated with standard business icons for sustainable workwear lines.

designers.name: Pooja Nair
designers.bio: Pooja Nair blends southern Indian weaves with fluid, elegant casual geometry. Her Bengaluru atelier works exclusively with local weavers, organic colors, and relaxed silks, catering to young Indian women who seek effortless, elevated elegance everyday.
achievements: Featured globally in Eco-Fashion London showcase
Collaborated on signature hand-block patterns with Mysore organic mills

history.event: Started with a boutique capsule in Indiranagar, Bengaluru.
Introduced the 'Elysiana' hand-loomed luxury kaftan series.
Awarded top eco-impact luxury status by India Clean-Fashion consortium.

products.name: The Gilded Marigold Lehenga
products.description: A breathtaking bridal lehenga woven in rich Banarasi silk, featuring meticulous hand-embroidered zardozi work, gold plated threads, and hand-stitched sequin borders. Comes with a pure silk organza dupatta in royal marigold. Inspired by ancient heritage patterns.

products.name: Rose Quartz Zardozi Anarkali
products.description: Crafted in ultra-premium raw silk, this heavy flared Anarkali features stunning rose gold hand-embroidery along the chest, cuffs, and floor-sweeping hem. Imbued with Indian craftsmanship.

products.name: The Ivory Power Crepe Blazer Suit
products.description: A tailored double-breasted power blazer paired with matching straight-leg trousers, styled for ambitious women. Crafted with Italian luxury crepe, structured shoulder pads, and discreet luxury gold buttons. Full satin lining.

products.name: Midnight Structural Linen Jumpsuit
products.description: A sharp, breathable, high-thread-count linen jumpsuit with sharp collars, structured waist belt, and deep pleats. Handcrafted to deliver effortless transition from high-stakes board meetings to premium dining.

products.name: The Monsoon Breeze Silk Kaftan
products.description: A floating casual masterpiece created from pure hand-blocked mulberry silk, showcasing organic hand-drawn Indian motifs, and subtle gold thread stitching along the dynamic high-low hemline. Comfortable yet luxurious.

products.name: Champagne Organic Cotton Midi
products.description: Woven in high-quality organic cotton with a soft champagne tint, this flared daily dress features structured gathers, delicate back ribbon closures, and internal pockets. Simple, luxurious, everyday dressing.

products.name: The Crimson Empress Cape Gown
products.description: Designed in collaboration with Aditi Deshmukh, this masterpiece is a modern floor-length hand-loomed silk gown draped with an over-the-shoulder Crimson Silk organza cape entirely hand-embroidered with classic motif beads.

products.name: Banarasi Gold Thread Heirloom Saree
products.description: An authentic, serial-numbered legacy saree hand-loomed over 3 months using genuine silver-plated zari threads dipped in premium 24k gold. Highly exclusive collectors item. Number 07 of 15 produced.

product.name: The Gilded Marigold Lehenga
product.description: A breathtaking bridal lehenga woven in rich Banarasi silk, featuring meticulous hand-embroidered zardozi work, gold plated threads, and hand-stitched sequin borders. Comes with a pure silk organza dupatta in royal marigold.

messages.content: Welcome to ANVAA, Vasantika. I am Aditi. I look forward to telling premium stories through your attire. How can I guide you today? Would you like a wedding design consultation or custom sizing advice?

reviews.comment: An absolute masterpiece! Wore this for my sangeet and received hundreds of compliments. The gold thread is gorgeous.
